case_title: GITANE WATERPROOFING & PAINTING VS SCHROBSDORFF, PHYLLIS

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SCHROBSDORFF, PHYLLIS
DEFT'S CCP 116.725 MOTION IS GRANTED. COURT FINDS THAT THERE WAS DEFECTIVE SERVICE OF PROCESS BASED ON PLFTS PROOF OF SERVICE FILED 1/31/95.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GITANE WATERPROOFING & PAINTING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCHROBSDORFF, PHYLLIS $4,958.00 PRINCIPAL, $44.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,002.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT SCHROBSDORFF, PHYLLIS HEARING SET FOR MAR-01-1996 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAR-01-1996, DENIED
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION VACATE JUDGMENT: CCP 116.725 OF MAY-16-1996, GRANTED
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION VACATE JUDGMENT: CCP 116.725 CONTINUED FROM APR-08-1996 TO MAY-16-1996 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,958.00 FILED BY GITANE WATERPROOFING & PAINTING AS TO DEFENDANT SCHROBSDORFF, PHYLLIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-09-1995 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
MOTION VACATE JUDGMENT: CCP 116.725 FILED BY DEFENDANT SCHROBSDORFF, PHYLLIS HEARING SET FOR APR-08-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT SCHROBSDORFF, PHYLLIS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SCHROBSDORFF, PHYLLIS
